MOVE_BELCH.notes: Selection blocked until the user has consumed a Berry.

MOVE_CRAFTY_SHIELD.notes: Static W2U pos effect blocks status moves for allies.

MOVE_DIAMOND_STORM.notes: W2U move data raises user Defense as a secondary effect.

MOVE_ELECTRIC_TERRAIN.notes: Animation generated from Discharge: keeps the user-side charge/burst, removes the target camera cut, and replaces target sparks with flattened floor spark emitters. Static W2U terrain blocks sleep and boosts grounded Electric moves.

MOVE_ELECTRIFY.notes: Static W2U pos effect rewrites the target's move type to Electric.

MOVE_FAIRY_LOCK.notes: Reuses vanilla Spider Web as PW2's Fairy Lock approximation.

MOVE_FELL_STINGER.notes: Static handler raises Attack by 2 after the user KOs a target.

MOVE_FLOWER_SHIELD.notes: Reuses the Rototiller-style Grass-type stat handler.

MOVE_FLYING_PRESS.notes: Type-effectiveness hook applies Fighting plus Flying effectiveness.

MOVE_FORESTS_CURSE.notes: Static handler adds Grass as a W2U extra type.

MOVE_FREEZEDRY.notes: Type-effectiveness hook treats Water targets as super effective.

MOVE_GEOMANCY.notes: Static handler adds the charge message; move data handles charge and stat boosts.

MOVE_GRASSY_TERRAIN.notes: Static W2U terrain heals grounded Pokemon and boosts Grass moves.

MOVE_HAPPY_HOUR.notes: Static handler sets BW2's money-double battle flag.

MOVE_ION_DELUGE.notes: Static W2U pos effect rewrites Normal moves to Electric.

MOVE_KINGS_SHIELD.notes: Static protect clone lowers contact attackers' Attack by 2.

MOVE_MAGNETIC_FLUX.notes: Static handler filters targets without Plus or Minus.

MOVE_MAT_BLOCK.notes: Static protect clone shields allies from damaging moves.

MOVE_MISTY_TERRAIN.notes: Static W2U terrain blocks status and weakens Dragon moves.

MOVE_PARTING_SHOT.notes: Static handler lowers offenses, then queues the user switch.

MOVE_PHANTOM_FORCE.notes: Reuses vanilla Shadow Force as PW2's Phantom Force approximation.

MOVE_POWDER.notes: Static transient handler marks the target and cancels Fire moves with damage.

MOVE_ROTOTILLER.notes: Static handler raises Attack and Sp. Atk for grounded Grass Pokemon.

MOVE_SPIKY_SHIELD.notes: Protect clone with W2U contact damage hook.

MOVE_STICKY_WEB.notes: Static W2U side effect lowers grounded switch-ins' Speed.

MOVE_TOPSYTURVY.notes: Static handler inverts target stat stages.

MOVE_TRICKORTREAT.notes: Animation generated from Razor Leaf: custom transparent ghost texture rises from the user, then projectile ghosts fly through the target while the field is dimmed. Static handler adds Ghost as a W2U extra type.

MOVE_VENOM_DRENCH.notes: Static handler filters targets that are not poisoned.

ABIL_AERILATE.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

ABIL_BATTERY.notes: Static White2Upgrade ally special-power handler ported from PW2Code Battery.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_BATTLE_BOND.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/BattleBond.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_BEAST_BOOST.notes: Static White2Upgrade KO stat-boost handler ported from PW2Code BeastBoost.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_BERSERK.notes: Static White2Upgrade HP-threshold stat-boost handler ported from PW2Code Berserk.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_BULLETPROOF.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported with expanded high-bit move flag; message ID 210 still needs in-game verification.

ABIL_COMATOSE.notes: White2Upgrade condition-fail, permanent-condition, Hex, and common status-reaction hooks ported from PW2Code BattleEngine.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Needs in-game verification.

ABIL_CORROSION.notes: White2Upgrade condition-fail hook ported from PW2Code BattleEngine.cpp so Corrosion bypasses native Poison/Steel poison immunity; builds in w2u_main.dll. Needs in-game verification.

ABIL_DANCER.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Dancer.cpp plus Dancer move follow-up hooks in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_DAZZLING.notes: Mapped to the ported Queenly Majesty priority-block handler, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_DISGUISE.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Disguise.cpp plus form/status hooks in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_ELECTRIC_SURGE.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/ElectricSurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_EMERGENCY_EXIT.notes: Partial White2Upgrade direct-damage Emergency Exit/Wimp Out behavior was manually verified, but PW2Code simple-damage/end-turn switch hook behavior is not yet ported; battleCode remains unchecked.

ABIL_FLUFFY.notes: Static White2Upgrade damage-ratio handler ported from PW2Code Fluffy.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_FULL_METAL_BODY.notes: Mapped to the vanilla Clear Body handler through a White2Upgrade ability-event alias, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_FUR_COAT.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

ABIL_GALVANIZE.notes: Static White2Upgrade normal-move conversion handler ported by extending the existing -ate family path; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_GRASSY_SURGE.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/GrassySurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_INNARDS_OUT.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/InnardsOut.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_LIQUID_VOICE.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/LiquidVoice.cpp plus sound-move hooks in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_LONG_REACH.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp contact hook; no standalone ability library.

ABIL_MEGA_LAUNCHER.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported with expanded high-bit pulse flag; needs in-game verification.

ABIL_MERCILESS.notes: Static White2Upgrade critical-check handler ported from PW2Code Merciless.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_MISTY_SURGE.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/MistySurge.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_PIXILATE.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

ABIL_POWER_CONSTRUCT.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/PowerConstruct.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_POWER_OF_ALCHEMY.notes: Mapped to the ported Receiver handler, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_PRISM_ARMOR.notes: Static White2Upgrade supereffective damage-reduction handler ported from PW2Code PrismArmor.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_QUEENLY_MAGESTY.notes: Static White2Upgrade priority-block handler ported from PW2Code QueenlyMagesty.cpp; compatibility spelling preserved with a clean alias in code. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_RECEIVER.notes: Static White2Upgrade fainted-ally ability-copy handler ported from PW2Code Receiver.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_REFRIGERATE.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported; needs in-game verification.

ABIL_RKS_SYSTEM.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code defines/list-checks ABIL_RKS_SYSTEM, but README says RKS System is not implemented; this likely needs a fresh Memory/Multitype-style implementation.

ABIL_SCHOOLING.notes: Not ported to White2Upgrade-Original yet. PW2Code source: Libraries/Abilities/Schooling.cpp; event table in Patches/BattleUpgrade/BattleEngine.cpp.

ABIL_SHADOW_SHIELD.notes: Mapped to the vanilla Multiscale handler through a White2Upgrade ability-event alias, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_SOUL_HEART.notes: Static White2Upgrade faint-reaction stat-boost handler ported from PW2Code SoulHeart.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_SURGE_SURFER.notes: Static White2Upgrade Electric Terrain speed-ratio handler ported from PW2Code SurgeSurfer.cpp; builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_TANGLING_HAIR.notes: Mapped to the existing Gooey contact Speed-drop handler, matching PW2Code. Builds in w2u_main.dll. Manually verified in White2Upgrade-Original on 2026-06-15.

ABIL_TOUGH_CLAWS.notes: Static White2Upgrade battle handler ported using FLAG_CONTACT fallback because MakesContact is not exported here; needs in-game verification.
